scenarios.description: Binary treated-successes with exact p around 1e-5.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Fisher exact one-sided tail for a 2x2 table. In this binary permutation setup, it matches full permutation enumeration.

scenarios.description: Binary treated-successes with exact p around 1e-7.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Fisher exact one-sided tail for a 2x2 table. In this binary permutation setup, it matches full permutation enumeration.

scenarios.description: GWAS-like additive score: Binomial(2, maf=0.15) dosages, n=40, right-tail treated dosage sum with a near-extreme but non-max case set.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Additive-dose score statistic T=sum_i G_i y_i with fixed case count. Observed labels are constructed by a one-swap downgrade from the maximal dosage sum.

scenarios.description: Rank-sum (Mann-Whitney U) with deterministic near-tail labels, n=40.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: DP over rank-sum counts with no ties in X.

scenarios.description: Difference in means on nonlinear numeric X=i^2, n=40.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: DP over treated weighted sums mapped exactly to difference in means.

scenarios.description: Zero-inflated Poisson benchmark: 80% zeros, otherwise Pois(4), n=40, right-tail difference in means with a near-extreme but non-max treated set.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Zero-inflated count data with exact linear-stat DP truth. Observed labels are a one-swap downgrade from the maximal treated-count sum.

scenarios.description: Poisson benchmark: treated~Pois(3), control~Pois(2), right-tail difference in means, n1=n2=100.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Deterministic benchmark dataset generated from Poisson draws with fixed seed; right-tail test on mean(group1)-mean(group0).

scenarios.description: Brute-force benchmark (non-DP statistic): right-tail Welch t-statistic, n=22 with non-extreme observed labeling.
scenarios.permutation_p_value_definition: Right-tail probability from full permutation enumeration over all fixed-size labelings.
scenarios.notes: Welch t-statistic is nonlinear in group variances and not covered by current linear/rank DP solvers. Exact p-value computed via full brute-force permutation enumeration.
